<?php namespace Spatie\Backup\Helpers; use Carbon\Carbon; class Format { public static function humanReadableSize(float $sizeInBytes): string { $units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB', 'TB']; if ($sizeInBytes === 0.0) { return '0 '.$units[1]; } for ($i = 0; $sizeInBytes > 1024; $i++) { $sizeInBytes /= 1024; } return round($sizeInBytes, 2).' '.$units[$i]; } public static function emoji(bool $bool): string { return $bool ? '✅' : '❌'; } public static function ageInDays(Carbon $date): string { return number_format(round($date->diffInMinutes() / (24 * 60), 2), 2).' ('.$date->diffForHumans().')'; } }
